---
title: "Phoebe Anne Allen"
---

## Phoebe Anne Allen

**Dates:** (1850-1933)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society and contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

Daughter of the Rev. John Collins Allen, Vicar of Hawley, Hants 1878-86, she was a Gosling as ‘Gridiron’.  Living at Finchcox, Kilndown, Staplehurst (10 July 1870) and Hinton Martel Rectory, Wimborne (December 1876), she was perhaps a governess. She was author of 45 odd novels, stories for SPCK and translations.  She was lame. [Vital Records Index; 1881 census, Will;  <i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>; Who\'s Who in Lit 1906-34; BL cat]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 29 [1899]
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Oct 19 [1898]](../letters/3386_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- Letter from Jany 31st 1877
- Letter from Aug 7th [?1874[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from [10 July 1870]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
